Bash(git -C /Users/lyndonlee/Desktop/bdv-website commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Mobile optimization & fix floating nav active tab tracking

Mobile:
- Add useIsMobile hook for responsive JS branching
- Fix text overflow: remove whiteSpace nowrap on HeroDark/Stages, use md:whitespace-nowrap
- Reduce font size minimums on mobile \(Hero, HeroDark, Focus, FooterCTA\)
- Reduce BlurOrb sizes and disable blur animations on mobile for performance
- Skip mouse-follow gradient on mobile \(static center gradient instead\)
- Reduce Stages sticky card offset \(120px → 60px\) and sketch image height on mobile
- Team cards: tap-to-flip on mobile \(first tap flips, second tap opens modal\)
- Disable CSS hover flip on mobile, increase modal close button touch target
- Reduce backdrop-filter blur intensity on Stages cards for mobile
- Adjust Lenis: snappier duration \(0.8s\), lower touch multiplier \(1.5\), disable smoothWheel

Desktop nav fix:
- Replace IntersectionObserver with scroll-position tracker in FloatingNav
- IntersectionObserver couldn''t work with CrossfadeSequence \(all sections stacked
  in same absolute-positioned container, all intersecting simultaneously\)
- New approach uses scroll progress math for crossfade region and
  getBoundingClientRect for sections below
- Fix logo click and Home button to scrollTo top \(id="hero" didn''t exist\)

Building images:
- Add alternate building images \(building2a/2b, building3a, building5a/5b\)
- Switch PastLife sections to building2b with cover sizing, flipped horizontally

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
